---
title: "GSM - AE Distribution Report"
subtitle: "Generated with the Good Statistical Monitoring {gsm} package"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: scroll
    css: styles.css
params:
  lSnapshot: NA
  dfStudyComp: NA
  dfTreatmentComp: NA
  lTreatmentCompCharts: NA
  lStudyCompCharts: NA
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(gsm)
library(DT)
library(gt)
library(dplyr)
library(plotly)
library(glue)
library(htmltools)
devtools::load_all()
```

```{r}
# ## Create data --------------------------------------------------------
# study_comp <- Covariate_Map(dfCovariate = params$snapshot$lStudyAssessResults$kri0006$lData$dfSTUDCOMP,
#               strCovariateColName = "compreas", 
#               strWorkflowId = "kri0006"
#               )
#  
# treat_comp <- Covariate_Map(dfCovariate = params$snapshot$lStudyAssessResults$kri0007$lData$dfSDRGCOMP,
#               strCovariateColName = "sdrgreas", 
#               strWorkflowId = "kri0007"
#               )
# 
# study_comp_charts <- Covariate_Charts(study_comp)
# 
# treat_comp_charts <- Covariate_Charts(treat_comp)
```

Study Discontinuation
================================================================

Sidebar {.sidebar}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
# Study
h4(strong("Study:"))
cat(unique(params$dfStudyComp$kri0006$study$`Study ID`))

# Snapshot
h4(strong("Snapshot:"))
cat(as.character(params$lSnapshot$lSnapshotDate))

```

Scatter Plot {.tabset .tabset-fade}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
tab_title("Study-wide Discontinuation Reasons")
```

### <font size=3px>**Scatter Plot**</font> 
```{r}
params$lSnapshot$lCharts$kri0006$scatterJS
```

### <font size=3px>**Bar Plot (Metric)**</font> 
```{r}
params$lSnapshot$lCharts$kri0006$barMetricJS
```

### <font size=3px>**Bar Plot (Score)**</font> 
```{r}
params$lSnapshot$lCharts$kri0006$barScoreJS
```

Bar Plot Study {.tabset .tabset-fade}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
tab_title("Study-wide Discontinuation Reasons")
```

```{r}
fig_bar_study <- round(length(unique(params$dfStudyComp$kri0006$study$Metric))/3)
fig_bar_site <- round(length(unique(params$dfStudyComp$kri0006$site$`Site ID`))/3)
```

### <font size=3px>**Number**</font> 
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_study} }
params$lStudyCompCharts$study_total
```

### <font size=3px>**Percent**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_study} }
params$lStudyCompCharts$study_percent
```

Bar Plot Site {.tabset .tabset-fade}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
tab_title("Site-wide Discontinuation Reasons")
```

### <font size=3px>**Number**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_site} }
params$lStudyCompCharts$site_total
```

### <font size=3px>**Percent**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_site} }
params$lStudyCompCharts$site_percent
```

Treatment Discontinuation
================================================================

Sidebar {.sidebar}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
# Study
h4(strong("Study:"))
cat(unique(params$dfTreatmentComp$kri0007$study$`Study ID`))

# Snapshot
h4(strong("Snapshot:"))
cat(as.character(params$lSnapshot$lSnapshotDate))

```

Scatter Plot {.tabset .tabset-fade}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
tab_title("Treatment Discontinuation Rate by Site")
```

### <font size=3px>**Scatter Plot**</font> 
```{r}
params$lSnapshot$lCharts$kri0007$scatterJS
```

### <font size=3px>**Bar Plot (Metric)**</font> 
```{r}
params$lSnapshot$lCharts$kri0007$barMetricJS
```

### <font size=3px>**Bar Plot (Score)**</font> 
```{r}
params$lSnapshot$lCharts$kri0007$barScoreJS
```

Bar Plot Study {.tabset .tabset-fade}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
tab_title("Study-wide Discontinuation Reasons")
```

```{r}
fig_bar_study <- round(length(unique(params$dfTreatmentComp$kri0007$study$Metric))/3)
fig_bar_site <- round(length(unique(params$dfTreatmentComp$kri0007$site$`Site ID`))/3)
```

### <font size=3px>**Number**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_study} }
params$lTreatmentCompCharts$study_total
```

### <font size=3px>**Percent**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_study} }
params$lTreatmentCompCharts$study_percent
```

Bar Plot Site {.tabset .tabset-fade}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
tab_title("Site-wide Discontinuation Reasons")
```

### <font size=3px>**Number**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_site} }
params$lTreatmentCompCharts$site_total
```

### <font size=3px>**Percent**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_site} }
params$lTreatmentCompCharts$site_percent
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
cbar <- system.file('utils-0.0.1', 'bringCovariateBarToTop.js', package = "gsm")
```

```{js, file={cbar}, echo=FALSE}
```
